response.justification: Strong software engineer with 15+ years continuous experience and excellent technical breadth, but fundamentally misaligned with this AI strategy-focused Principal role. Lacks the core requirement for 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—only recent infrastructure work (MCP) exists. No Master's/PhD in AI, no evidence of thought leadership on AI strategy, and no documented experience advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. Would excel in a general Staff Engineer role instead.
strengths: 15+ years continuous software engineering experience across diverse platforms, languages, and domains
Demonstrated engineering leadership through software craftsmanship practices (TDD, mentoring, courses) and sustained technical depth
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real-world adoption
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in building AI/ML-powered products or platforms; only recent infrastructure work with MCP is insufficient
Missing preferred advanced degree in AI field and no evidence of recognized thought leadership or expertise in AI space
Limited strategic cloud platform experience; expertise is implementation-focused (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than strategy-level architecture

key_factors.factor: No advanced degree or recognized AI thought leadership
Strong engineering fundamentals and leadership practices
